trades.reasoning: Score 95 with full bullish trifecta — MACD crossover, rising histogram, RSI 67.5 in momentum zone without being overbought — AI infrastructure sector remains strong and $598 cash deploys cleanly at ~16 shares.

decisions.briefing: Markets were mildly negative today with S&P 500 off 0.3% and NASDAQ flat, signaling a neutral to cautious tape. Existing positions show no stop-loss triggers based on available data, so no forced exits. With five open slots and $598 in idle cash, deploying into APLD — top-scored AI infrastructure play with clean technical setup and bullish momentum — to put capital to work without overreaching in a soft market.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted slightly lower on May 4, 2026, with the S&P 500 down 0.3% and the NASDAQ nearly flat, reflecting a lack of strong directional catalysts rather than outright selling pressure. Markets appeared to digest recent gains as investors weighed ongoing macro uncertainty, including elevated interest rate expectations and mixed corporate earnings signals. The neutral tone suggests institutional participants are in a 'wait and see' mode, neither aggressively adding risk nor rotating to safety assets.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於2026年5月4日小幅下滑，標普500指數跌0.3%，納斯達克指數幾乎持平，反映出市場缺乏明確方向性催化劑，而非真正的拋售壓力。在利率預期居高以及企業財報訊號參差不齊的背景下，投資者選擇消化近期漲幅。整體中性格局顯示，機構投資者普遍採取觀望態度，既未積極加碼風險資產，也未明顯轉向防禦配置。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying assets that have been rising and showing strong price and technical signals, betting the trend will continue. Indicators like RSI in the 55–70 zone and a bullish MACD crossover together suggest a stock has energy behind it without being dangerously overbought. Today's top picks like APLD with score 95 are classic momentum setups — the strategy works best in neutral-to-bullish markets like today's.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲、技術指標強勁的股票，押注趨勢將延續。當RSI處於55至70的「黃金動能區間」，且MACD出現多頭交叉時，代表股價具備上升動能但尚未進入超買狀態。今日最高評分標的如APLD便是典型的動能交易機會——這種策略在中性至偏多的市場環境中表現最為穩健。
